location: Dropped directly by the Valiant Gargoyle duo boss fight inside Siofra Aqueduct, a sub-dungeon off the upper Siofra River area. A guaranteed field-boss drop, not a chest or remembrance.
region: Siofra River / Nokron, Eternal City (underground, reached after defeating Starscourge Radahn)
tactics: Defeat Starscourge Radahn first — this triggers the meteor that opens Nokron, Eternal City
From Ancestral Woods grace, head to Aqueduct-Facing Cliffs, then east and drop down onto the aqueduct to enter
One Gargoyle (greatsword) starts alone; a second (twinblade) joins around half health — lure the first away from the entrance to fight them separately
Watch for the poison breath attack (sprint away rather than out-heal it); several big swings whiff if you stay close/roll under them
lore: Belonged to the Valiant Gargoyles, stone guardians who fought alongside — and eventually as substitutes for — fallen champions, their bodies patched together with corpse wax to keep fighting long after their original wielders died.

builds.name: Strength / Heavy
builds.why: C Strength scaling (pushed toward A with Heavy affinity) gives it the highest base AR of any twinblade

builds.name: Blood/Poison Arcane hybrid
builds.why: A strong bleed-infusion twinblade at high Arcane investment, per community reporting
